what_it_does: This file is a channel-attachment metadata record that links the design-source channel to an image asset located at image://design-source/capital-raise/p-17 and records when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It has an id att-bfef74e0, channel design-source, attachment_type images, and target image://design-source/capital-raise/p-17.
There are no code symbols or executable content.
standouts: It points to a specific image asset (p-17) under the capital-raise path.
It is typed as an images attachment in the design-source channel.
It functions as a ledger-style record with a stable id and timestamp.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Id follows an att- prefix with a UUID-like suffix.
Target uses an image:// URI scheme with a channel-scoped path.
concerns: No descriptive body or caption for the image.
The target URI cannot be verified from this file alone.
No author, source message, or provenance is recorded.
No explicit semantics for why the image is attached to the channel.
notes: A bare attachment stub that records an image asset (capital-raise/p-17) against the design-source channel with a stable id and timestamp.
questions: What does p-17 represent (page, figure, slide, version)?
Does the referenced image asset actually exist and where is it stored?
Why was this image attached to the design-source channel?
Is there a corresponding message or discussion that this attachment belongs to?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's fields declare an image attachment record, and that is exactly what it contains; no higher-level purpose is stated beyond cataloging the asset.
intention_signals: It appears designed to create a persistent, queryable ledger entry that associates a design-source channel with a specific image asset for later retrieval or context reconstruction.
contribution: It contributes a concrete, timestamped channel-to-image linkage (design-source -> capital-raise/p-17) with a stable identifier, which a fused system can retain as an asset reference.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel attachment metadata record (att-bfef74e0) in the design-source channel that points to the image asset image://design-source/capital-raise/p-17 and records its addition time.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to catalog and persist the association between a design-source channel and a specific capital-raise image asset.
